name: ICBCCS Seasons Income Bond Fund (LOF)
summary: ICBCCS Seasons Income Bond Fund (LOF) is a bond fund that aims to provide seasonal income and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund invests primarily in fixed-income securities, aiming to provide stable returns and regular income payouts. It is managed by ICBCCS Fund Management Co., Ltd., a joint venture between Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (ICBC) and Credit Suisse.
